form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 1784m at this track, beaten 55 m by Love Devine (2:11.50) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 M on March 22 at $23. Before that 5th (Sr2) over 1823m at Narrogin, beaten 21 m by Sanford Harry (2:16.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 7 at $41. Impossible to entertain.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 6th (Fr4) over 2180m after being wide early at Wagin beaten 13 m by Global Heritage (2:46.40) in 4yo+ 0-2 WIN on March 27 at $31. Before that was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 2190m after being wide early at this track beaten 30 m by Pick Me (2:45.60) in 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on March 22 at $41. Prepared to overlook against this lot.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr2) over 1177m at Pinjarra beaten 12 m by Ideal Interest (1:22.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $14. Two runs back surrendered the lead and finished 11th (Fr2) over 2130m after showing early speed at Gloucester Park beaten 50 m by The Wand Waver (2:36.50) in 4yo+ 1-3 WINs on September 16 at $101. Watch for a better run this time.

form.formComment: Well-beaten 15 days ago at Bunbury over 1609m, and two back was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr3) over 1730m at Gloucester Park, beaten 17 m by Sunpatra (2:07.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 24 at $126. Happy to work around him.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground from the 500m to be beaten 77m.
Raced keenly during the early and middle stages.
Shifted outwards markedly in the front straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Good run 5 metres third behind Global Heritage at Wagin over 2180m 4yo+ 0-2 WIN on March 27. Failed to finish behind Nowuseemegrin on April 2 at Wagin over 1776m 4yo+ 0-2 WINs. Ignore last start and assess on its third two starts back; Too good to put a line through after one mishap.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1609m at Bunbury, beaten 5.5 m by Karaoke Star (1:58.40) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on April 4 at $8.50. At the run before 5th (Sr2) over 1609m at Bunbury, beaten 25 m by Allizee (1:56.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 28 at $21. Going okay so keep her safe.

form.formComment: Gave plenty of ground last start when well beaten into seventh behind Ice Cold Sapporo at Pinjarra over 2185m in a 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on April 6 at $91. Raced better the start before that with a game effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1177m after showing early speed at Pinjarra beaten 4.5 m by Swanbourne Spunk (1:22.40) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $4.80. Strong winning prospects.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth behind You Fly With Me at Pinjarra over 1177m in a 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $16. Performed better the start before with a good run when 2nd (Fr2) over 1177m after showing early pace at Pinjarra, beaten a head by Akabah (1:23.10) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $3.90. Well placed, should prove hard to beat.
